description: Bayesian taxonomic assignment: likelihood x prior -> posterior probabilities

functions.name: run_llm_pipeline
functions.description: End-to-end LLM-shortcut workflow: auto-context, unreferenced detection, assignment, consensus, report

inputs.name: llm_fn
inputs.description: LLM provider function. NULL defaults to TaxaTools::call_anthropic_api

functions.scaling_note: Dominated by LLM API calls; ~1-2 min per 30 taxa

functions.name: run_bayesian_pipeline
functions.description: End-to-end Bayesian workflow: likelihoods + priors -> posterior -> consensus -> report

inputs.name: taxaexpect_priors
inputs.description: Prior probabilities from TaxaExpect (or build_priors() output)

inputs.name: site
inputs.description: Site specification: list(lat, lon) or list(grid_id, main_habitat)

functions.scaling_note: Fast once model and priors are precomputed; ~10 sec for 500 samples

functions.name: assign_taxa_llm
functions.description: LLM-based assignment: score-derived likelihoods + LLM priors -> posteriors per sample

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Site context from build_context(): ecoregion, main_habitat, date

inputs.name: context_group
inputs.description: Column for grouping taxa into context-specific batches

inputs.name: unreferenced_taxa
inputs.description: Named unreferenced species to include as hypotheses

inputs.name: known_present
inputs.description: Species known to be present (LLM context only)

output.description: Full posterior data frame with all hypotheses per sample

functions.scaling_note: LLM calls dominate; batches of 30 taxa per call

functions.name: build_context
functions.description: Auto-infer site context (habitat, ecoregion) from taxon names via LLM

inputs.name: habitat_scheme
inputs.description: Habitat scheme name: NULL (default 3-category), 'IUCN_L1', or 'IUCN_L2'. Pass a string, NOT a data frame.

output.description: One-row data frame: ecoregion, main_habitat, date

functions.scaling_note: 2-3 LLM calls regardless of taxon count

functions.name: score_consensus
functions.description: Simple score-based consensus: min_score + gap + rank_thresholds -> LCA. No model/priors needed.

inputs.name: rank_thresholds
inputs.description: Score thresholds per rank, e.g. c(species=98, genus=95, family=90)

output.description: One row per observation_id with consensus assignment

functions.name: posterior_consensus
functions.description: LCA-based consensus from posterior: plausible hypotheses -> one assignment per sample

inputs.name: posterior_df
inputs.description: Posterior data frame from compute_posterior or assign_taxa_llm

inputs.name: species_reference
inputs.description: For downranking: reference with finer-rank taxa

output.description: One row per observation_id with consensus_taxon, consensus_rank, consensus_posterior

functions.name: compute_posterior
functions.description: Core Bayes update: likelihood x prior -> posterior for each hypothesis

inputs.name: likelihood_w_prior
inputs.description: Data frame with likelihood and prior columns per hypothesis

output.description: Data frame with posterior_point_est, posterior_mean, posterior_sd per hypothesis

functions.scaling_note: Fast; ~1 sec per 1000 rows with MC

functions.name: join_priors
functions.description: Join TaxaExpect priors to likelihood table by taxon_name + site

output.description: Likelihood table with prior columns added

functions.name: suggest_unreferenced_species
functions.description: LLM-first unreferenced species detection: plausible species per genus not in reference

output.description: Character vector of unreferenced species; census and plausible in attributes

functions.scaling_note: LLM calls + optional NCBI verification; ~2-5 min

functions.name: generate_report
functions.description: Generate publication-ready Methods + Results text from pipeline outputs

inputs.name: llm_fn
inputs.description: LLM for narrative Results (template if NULL)

inputs.name: study_description
inputs.description: Brief study context for report intro

functions.scaling_note: One LLM call for Results; template-only if llm_fn = NULL
